reasoning: The target to beat is 9.25°C, which was an unusually cool daily average for October 26, 2025 in Poitiers. For the first resolution date (Nov 2), early November climatology remains relatively mild (historical daily means generally around 9.5-10.5°C). Reversion to the mean suggests the temperature will likely bounce back above 9.25°C, making this more likely than not (around 58%). For the second resolution date (Nov 25), seasonal cooling becomes pronounced, with late November daily means typically dropping to ~6.5°C. Exceeding 9.25°C in late November requires a mild anomaly (roughly 1 standard deviation above the seasonal average), which happens occasionally as seen in historical data, but has a base rate probability of around 25-30%.
